System ScaleRepo-derived counts with honest labels
HomeSystem StoryHierarchyAgent RegistryValidator MapLive Dashboard

Scale snapshot

The repo is large enough to prove a real program, but small enough to audit.

Every exact count shown below comes from a manifest, a file count, dashboard data, or the canonical export graph. The demo now exposes exact agent and department counts instead of inventing placeholders. Live runtime agents enabled: 0. Runtime activation: not started.

Exact counts we will not fake

Exact agent count: 47,979. Exact department count: 1,777. Exact unit count: 5,331. Exact family count: 175. Hierarchy levels: 7. Operational domains: 11. Source: org_chart_export.json. Live runtime agents enabled: 0. Runtime activation: not started.

CategoryCountCount TypeSource / Method

Verified scale is enough to matter

The repository has a meaningful surface area: reports, validators, dashboard artifacts, and structured manifests across multiple layers.

Exact counts are declared

The canonical export graph resolves exact agent and department counts with source traceability.

Recommended next docs step

Use the agent registry page and traceability HTML as the published registry surface for stakeholder review.

This scale inventory is mirrored in the repo under `system_scale_inventory.md` and backed by `./data/agent_department_registry_traceability.html`.
